mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rqst_id) FROM board WHERE rqst_id IS NOT NULL AND rqst_id != ''
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_type LIKE 'ERP_SERMON%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_type LIKE 'ERP_ACCOUNT%' AND ins_dt >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT CAST(rqst_no AS VARCHAR) AS id, title, 'PENDING' AS status, TO_CHAR(ins_dt, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS date FROM board WHERE board_type LIKE 'ERP_SERMON%' ORDER BY ins_dt DESC LIMIT 4
